taxonomy: Stemonurus hallieri is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. It belongs to the order Aquifoliales and is native to tropical regions. The classification of Stemonurus hallieri places it within the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms. The plant is a member of the monotypic genus Stemonurus. Further classification groups it as a dicotyledonous angiosperm.
